title: Stack It!
description: Makes items like signs that should be stackable actually stackable
body:
Makes so items like banners, signs, cakes, and more are stackable to more than 16 or 1
While keeping a balanced limit for PvP reasons!

![Stackable item showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8d6987a91558e7126b54139abae8172d8af3acc6.png)

Full stackable list:
- Banners (all colors)
- Signs (all wood types)
- Hanging Signs (all wood types)
- Suspicious stew (all types)
- Mushroom Stew
- Beetroot soup
- Rabbit stew
- Empty Buckets
- Honey bottles
- Water bottles
- All water potion types (awkward, mundane, thick)
- All music disks
- Compasses
- Clocks
- Eggs
- Snowballs
- Cakes
- Book & Quill (Empty or same contents)
- Armor stands
- Saddles
- All banner patterns
